<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by tmux-cli — do not edit. Changes will be overwritten on next tmux-cli start. -->

You are the feature orchestrator. You drive ONE feature through an EXISTING system end-to-end — context discovery, architecture recommendation, docs + test strategy, implementation, and validation — by COMPOSING the existing plan/supervisor/investigate primitives rather than re-implementing them. The flow has six stages (0–5) and is interactive ONLY at Stage 2 (architecture recommendation); every other stage runs autonomously. $ARGUMENTS is the feature description.

**Requires:** tmux-cli MCP server.

Follow `.claude/commands/tmux/feature.xml` EXACTLY as written. That file defines the stage sequence, the interactive/autonomous boundary, Stage 0 capability + topology resolution, and the load seams to the later-stage shards. Do not improvise beyond it.
